info: This item can be put inside a <info>holder</info> of an appropriate size.

name: indoor plant
description: A variety of plant, used for decoration.

name: yellow indoor plant
description: A variety of plant for decoration.  It's yellow.

name: stepladder
description: A short, foldable ladder.  Can help you climb to a rooftop, or maybe slow something down.
This is a rolled up wall kit, which you could make a wall or an improvised barricade out of one.  It could break easliy if something blows up nearby.

name: canvas wall
description: A wall made of stretched, heavy-duty, waterproof plastic wall.

name: barricade
description: A wall made of stretched, heavy-duty, waterproof thick plastic wall.

name: dispenser
description: A dispenser which, you could make ammo or medkits out of one.

name: fire barrel (200L)
description: A large metal barrel used to contain a fire.  It has multiple holes punched in its walls for air supply.  Fires set in a fire barrel will not spread to surrounding flammable objects.

name: tablesaw
description: A rotating saw blade set into a large flat table, for making straight measured cuts.  One of the key tools in a carpenter's arsenal.
//: some day this should be something you can activate to take down and get an item version of.  That day is not today.

bash.//: Variable reduction since might hit more or less material.

name: mitre saw
description: A circular saw blade on an arm that can slide and rotate in several directions, this is a staple tool for nearly any carpentry.
//: some day this should be something you can activate to take down and get an item version of.  That day is not today.

bash.//: Variable reduction since might hit more or less material.

name: bandsaw
description: A ribbonlike sawblade runs in a single direction in this tool, allowing precise cuts at almost any angle.

bash.//: Variable reduction since might hit more or less material.

description: Metal flame jerrycan for boobytraps.  Use it at your own risk.

name: flame jerrycan
description: Modified jerrycan, if destroyed, could blow some serious stuff up.

name: mechanical light
description: An industrial flood light set up to illuminate the surroundings.

name: mechanical light
description: An industrial flood light set up to illuminate the surroundings.

bash.//: Some extra wire and scrap metal from smash results matching vehicle floodlights
bash.//2: destroy_threshold equal to str_min instead of str_max due to delicate electronics

use_action.training_msg: You swing and jab at the sword dummy, sweat dripping as your technique improves.

name: sword dummy
description: Slash!  Study your blades!  Main selling point: it doesn't fight back!  Examine it to practice your Cutting weapons skill.

use_action.training_msg: You swing and jab at the sword dummy, sweat dripping as your technique improves.

name: sword dummy
description: Slash!  Study your blades!  Main selling point: it doesn't fight back!  Examine it to advance your Cutting weapons skill.

use_action.training_msg: You swing at the tire dummy, sweat dripping as your technique improves.

name: tire dummy
description: Bonk!  Study your bashing weapons!  Main selling point: it doesn't fight back!  Examine it to practice your Bashing and Cutting weapons skill.

info: This clothing is padded with pillows <good>increase</good> its overall <info>warmth</info>.

name: bamboo tree
description: A fast-growing bamboo grove bred to thrive far from its original climate, spreading through cracked asphalt and ruined suburbs.  The hollow stalks clatter in the wind like bones, green even as everything else withers.  If you split one open, you might find stored water and pale shoots already pushing to grow again.  With the right tools, you could cut it down and turn it into shelter, weapons, or fire.

name: bamboo tree
description: A fast-growing bamboo grove bred to thrive far from its original climate, spreading through cracked asphalt and ruined suburbs.  The hollow stalks clatter in the wind like bones, green even as everything else withers.  If you split one open, you might find stored water and pale shoots already pushing to grow again.  With the right tools, you could cut it down and turn it into shelter, weapons, or fire.  Looks like all the ripe bamboo staffs have been picked.
